snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Written by Shridhar Raghavan
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Subscribe & Follow Sony Music India:

https://www.facebook.com/SonyMusicIndia

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE  #gta5 #gtav #gaming
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6 

  #gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul

snippet.title: #1 EK SAPNA? | CONQUEROR OR WHAT | BGMI + Xtreme 125R/160R Review
snippet.description:
LOLz Gaming is LIVE and ready to go full chaos mode!
Aaj ke stream mein lagne wali hai pure LOLz-style masti + BGMI domination —
crazy moments, clutch sprays, unexpected wipes, aur thoda sa unfiltered LOLz energy!
Upar se ek special bike feature breakdown bhi: Hero Xtreme 125R & Xtreme 160R 4V ka fun + honest review, bilkul LOLz ke style mein.
Agar aapko BGMI gameplay ke saath entertainment, real reactions aur bikes ka light-but-informative breakdown pasand hai…
toh yeh stream perfect hai!
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 125R – The Smart Mini Beast
* Dual Channel ABS — better stopping, better confidence
* Cruise Control — long ride = chill scene
* 3 Ride Modes — Eco | Power | Road
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD — clean & premium
🏍️ Hero Xtreme 160R 4V – The Fun Street Monster
* New LED Headlight — brighter, sharper look
* Cruise Control — relaxed high-speed riding
* 3 Ride Modes — Rain | Road | Sports
* 4.2” Multi-Colour LCD — bold & modern
🎮 Stream Highlights
😂 Funny in-game moments
🔥 Unexpected clutch plays
🎯 Clean spray transfers
🏍️ Easy-to-understand bike feature breakdown
💬 Chat vibes always on peak
Pinned comment mein test ride link mil jayega — check out karna mat bhoolna!
Like, Share & Subscribe for more LOLz Gaming moments ❤️⚡"

snippet.title: Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala
snippet.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

Par itni bulandi pe

Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

nas nas kyu dukhei, nas nas kyu dukhe, nas nas kyu dukhei, piya meri nas nas kyu dookhei, nas nas kyu dukhi song, balam meri nas nas kyu dukhei , nas nas kyu dukhi song dj, nas nas kyu dukhi song dance, nas nas kyu dikhe song dj remix, nas nas kyu dukhe, braj bhasha song, braj songs, anjali raghav new song, anjali raghav nas nas kyu dukhe, piya meri nas nas dukhe song, nas nas kyu dukhe remix, new braj bhasha song, new brajbhasha song 2026.



Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
🎤 Singers: Diler Kharkiya
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music


video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Teaser: Chhaava शी तुलना, Riteish Deshmukh Look चर्चेत, राजा शिवाजी सिनेमा गाजणार का ?
snippet.description:
#BolBhidu #RajaShivaji #RitieshDeshmukh

नाम के आगे राजा लगाने से कोई राजा नही बनता, संजय दत्तचा खर्जातला आवाज येतो आणि त्यानंतर स्क्रीनवर पहिल्यांदा संजय दत्तच दिसतो, पण खऱ्या अर्थाने हिट होतो संजय दत्तचा दुसरा डायलॉग, मराठो के मुकद्दर में या तो मौत लिखी है या फिर गुलामी, रितेश देशमुखच्या राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरच्या टीझरमधला हा सिन. टिझरमध्ये आऊसाहेब जिजाऊ दिसतात, अफझलखान दिसतो, बडी  बेगम दिसते, सईबाई राणीसाहेब दिसतात आणि छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो रितेश देशमुख. राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरची प्रचंड चर्चा होती, पिक्चरची स्टोरी, ट्रिओलॉजी, कोण कुणाचा रोल करणार अशा अनेक गोष्टी चर्चेत होत्या, त्यात धुरंधर-२ सोबत काही थिएटर्समध्ये टिझर रिलीझ झाला, पण जेव्हा हा टीझर युट्युबवर आला, तेव्हा मात्र मिक्स्ड रिऍक्शन आल्या, अनेकांनी राजा शिवाजीची तुलना छावाशी केली, कुणी कौतुक केलं, कुणी टीका केली, पण यात एक प्रश्न उभा राहिला छावाला जमलं ते राजा शिवाजी सिनेमाला जमेल का ? पाहुयात या व्हिडीओमधून.. 

चॅनेलला सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका. नोटिफिकेशन चालू ठेवा म्हणजे लेटेस्ट व्हिडीओचे नोटिफिकेशन तुम्हाला मिळत राहतील. 
https://www.youtube.com/@BolBhidu

✒️ आपणही आपले लेख, विषय व इतर माहिती आम्हाला bolbhidu1@gmail.com या मेल आयडीवर पाठवू शकता. 

Connect With Us On🔎

➡️ Twitter : https://twitter.com/bolbhidu
➡️ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bolbhidu
➡️Website: https://bolbhidu.com/

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Teaser | Yeh Sirf Shuruaat Hai | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy
snippet.description:
What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as Vicky’s Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures and Neem Tree Emtertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani

DOP: Stanley Mudda
Editor: Sanjay Sankla
Music: Monty Sharma
Casting: Taran Bajaj

Production Designer: Keshav Thakur
Art Director: Rakesh Sutar
Costume Design: Sachin Lovalekar
Makeup Design: Amit Ambedkar
Sound Designer: Sandip Sarkar

Executive Producer: Siddhant Sheth
Chief AD: Deeksha Rana
Action Director: Amit Naikar
DA & Script Supervisor: Himanshu Raj Kanth

snippet.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan… 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan… 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

Aah aah aah aah aah

snippet.title: EK RAAT KI DULHAN | OFFICIAL TRAILER | NEW BHOJPURI FILM | JYOTI MISHRA | NEW HORROR MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
Ek Raat Ki Dulhan - Official Trailer | एक रात की दुल्हन | New Horror Thriller Film 2026 | 3R Films & Productions
क्या आप तैयार हैं एक ऐसी रात के लिए जहाँ डर का साया हर कदम पर आपका पीछा करेगा?
क्या होगा जब एक रात की खुशी, उम्र भर के खौफ में बदल जाएगी?
इस डरावने सफर का हिस्सा बनें और देखें कि क्या छुपा है उस घूंघट के पीछे! 

3R MUSIC ORIGINALS
BANNER - 3R FILMS & PRODUCTIONS
FILM- EK RAAT KI DULHAN (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- JYOTI MISHRA, AMIT SHUKLA, AYAZ KHAN, SONI RAJ, SEEMA YADAV, SUNNY SHARMA, SANJEEV MISHRA, DILIP RAWAT AND OTHERS
PRODUCER - NOORSABA SHAIKH
DIRECTOR- ISHTIYAQUE SHAIKH BUNTY
CONCEPT – NOORSABA SHAIKH
WRITER - SHAKEEL NIYAZI
MUSIC DIRECTOR- SAJAN MISHRA & DHANRAJ DHANNO
LYRICS – RAVI YADAV, RAJKUMAR
EDITOR- NAGENDRA YADAV
CINEMATOGRAPHER- DK SHARMA
CHOREOGRAPHER- SONU PRITAM
PUBLICITY DESIGNER - DEWA ARTS (SURAJ GIRI)
ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR - VIVEK KUMAR
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAISWAL
POST PRODUCTION – EYE VISION STUDIO (NAGENDRA YADAV)
BACKGROUND MUSIC - RAJESH KURMI
SOUND MIXING - RAJ VERMA
DI - NARENDRA PAL
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – TAMSEEL MOMIN, MANGAL CHAUHAN

🔔 चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें:
अगर आपको हमारा काम पसंद आया, तो वीडियो को Like करें, Comment में अपनी राय दें और चैनल को Subscribe करके Bell Icon जरूर दबाएं ताकि आप आने वाली फिल्मों के अपडेट मिस न करें!

This Malayalam movie trailer has already created buzz among fans, and we couldn’t wait to watch and react to it. From powerful visuals to intense moments, this trailer gave us goosebumps 😱. If you're a fan of Malayalam cinema, this is something you definitely don’t want to miss!

In this video:
👉 First-time reaction to Patriot trailer
👉 Honest expressions and breakdown
👉 Emotional + mass moments discussion
👉 Tamil audience perspective on Malayalam content

snippet.title: Abhi Saikia, Pinki Medhi, Sens3i - Bohona (Visualizer)
snippet.description:
A heart caught between riverbanks and spring winds. A promise lingers in the air: when Bohag arrives, the season of new beginnings, this love will finally become their own.

A melody of longing, hope, and the timeless magic of Assamese spring. 🌸

BOHONA

Music Production, Composition & Vocals: Abhi Saikia
Vocals: Pinky Medhi
Music Production, Mixing and Mastering: Sens3i 
Lyrics: Somiran Malay 
Guitar: Akul
Flute: Anjan Medhi 
Studio Partner: Symphony Records, Dibrugarh (Purav Gohain)

Album art and visualizer by Sameucliff

snippet.title: MOHANLAL Launched PATRIOT Trailer | Kavitha Theatre | Mammootty | Fahadh Faasil
snippet.description:
History has been scripted in Malayalam Cinema! Watch the monumental moments from the simultaneous trailer launch of the year’s most anticipated spy thriller, PATRIOT, featuring the legendary duo Mammootty and Mohanlal.  
​In a first-of-its-kind event, the "Big M’s" of Mollywood took over Kerala at the exact same time—Mohanlal at Kavitha Theatre, Ernakulam, and Mammootty at Ragam Theatre, Thrissur—to unveil the high-octane trailer of their latest collaboration.  
​Directed by the visionary Mahesh Narayanan, Patriot brings these two icons back to the screen after an 18-year gap. This video captures the electric atmosphere, the fan frenzy.

Cast And Crew : 
Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Nayanthara, Kunchacko Boban, Revathy, and Darshana Rajendran.  
​Director: Mahesh Narayanan  
​Music: Sushin Shyam  
​Producers: Anto Joseph & K. G. Anil Kumar.

प्यार और भावनाओं से भरी आवाज़ें, Alka Yagnik और Udit Narayan की! सुनिए फिल्म 'Aa Ab Laut Chalen' का ये खूबसूरत गाना और खो जाइये 90s के रोमांटिक दौर में। इस गाने में प्यार की गहराई और मधुरता है जो सीधे दिल को छू जाती है। 1999 के इस गाने को सुनकर आप पुराने दिनों की यादों में खो जाएंगे। ये गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Album: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


अगर ये गाना आपको पसंद आया तो Like करें, Comment करें और हमें Subscribe करना न भूलें! अपनी पसंदीदा 90s के गाने के बारे में कमेंट सेक्शन में बताएं।

#AlkaYagnik #UditNarayan #90sHindiSongs #RomanticSongs #AaAbLautChalen #BollywoodClassics #LoveSongs #HindiMusic #OldHindiSongs

Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम Ram Naam Jap Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer:  Kuldeep Mahar
Singer : Sagar Bedardi
Editing: Lala Mothiyapura
Music Label : Bhakti Records

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan #bhajan #hindibhajan
tags: Mere tan mein bhi ram mere mann mein bhi ram
Mere Tan Me Ram Mere Man Me Ram

snippet.title: ഗാഗുൽത്താ മലയിൽ നിന്നും വിലാപത്തിൻ മാറ്റൊലി | ദുഃഖവെള്ളി ഗാനങ്ങൾ 2026 | Good Friday Songs Malayalam
snippet.description:
Like ✔ Comment✔ Tag ✔ Share ✔
കണ്ണീരിലാഴ്ത്തുന്ന ഒരു മനോഹരഗാനം 🙏 ഷെയർ ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയുന്നവർ ഷെയർ ചെയ്യണമേ... എല്ലാവരെയും ദൈവം അനുഗ്രഹിക്കുമാറാകട്ടെ....!!!
PLEASE SHARE MAXIMUM!! 

" ഗാഗുൽത്താ മലയിൽ നിന്നും വിലാപത്തിൻ മാറ്റൊലി കേൾപ്പൂ....." 

Lyrics 👇
ഗാഗുൽത്താ മലയിൽ നിന്നും 
വിലാപത്തിൻ മാറ്റൊലി കേൾപ്പൂ 
ഏവമെന്നെ ക്രൂശിലേറ്റുവാൻ 
അപരാധമെന്തു ഞാൻ ചെയ്തു....  (ഗാഗുൽത്താ..)

മുന്തിരി ഞാൻ നാട്ടു നിങ്ങൾക്കായി 
മുന്തിരിച്ചാറൊരുക്കി വച്ചൂ 
എങ്കിലുമീ കയ്പുനീരല്ലേ 
ദാഹശാന്തിക്കെനിക്കു നൽകീ.... (ഗാഗുൽത്താ..)

കടലന്നു കരയാക്കി ഞാൻ 
ഭയം നിങ്ങൾക്കകറ്റിയില്ലേ 
അതിനെല്ലാം നന്ദിയായി നിങ്ങൾ 
കുരിശല്ലോ നൽകിടിന്നിപ്പോൾ.... (ഗാഗുൽത്താ..)

രാജചെങ്കോലേകി വാഴിച്ചു 
നിങ്ങളെ ണാനെന്തു മാനിച്ചു 
എൻ ശിരസ്സിൽ മുൾമുടി ചാർത്തി 
നിങ്ങളിന്നെൻ ചെന്നിണം തൂകി..... (ഗാഗുൽത്താ..)

hi.title: बिग एंड स्मॉल मैकक्वीन और पुलिस कार बनाम ज़ॉम्बी मैक, विशाल स्पीड बम्प्स वाली डाउनहिल रेस – BeamN...
hi.description:
#BeamNGGameplay #FlatbedTruckMcQueen #FlatbedTruck
#CrashPhysics #FlatbedTruck #BeamNGGameplay
बड़ा और छोटा मैकक्वीन और पुलिस कार बनाम ज़ॉम्बी मैक, विशाल स्पीड बम्प्स पर डाउनहिल रेस – BeamNG.drive
https://youtu.be/ArpQhQ-wTuI
एक और रोमांचक BeamNG.Drive वीडियो में आपका स्वागत है! 🚚 इस एपिसोड में, हम दिग्गज फ्लैटबेड ट्रक मैकक्वीन को विशाल गड्ढों से भरे चुनौतीपूर्ण इलाके में वाहनों को ले जाते हुए दिखा रहे हैं! क्या कारें इस सफर में बच पाएंगी, या गड्ढे इस लड़ाई को जीत लेंगे? दुर्घटनाओं, भौतिकी और मजेदार पलों से भरपूर इस एक्शन से भरपूर सिमुलेशन में पता लगाएं।

snippet.title: Jitni Dafa - Lyrical | PARMANU | John Abraham , Diana | Jeet Gannguli | RashmiVirag
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Jeet Gannguli and Yasser Desai’s ‘Jitni Dafa’ is a romantic song that will make you believe in love again.

The movie features John Abraham, Diana Penty and Boman Irani in lead roles.

Song - Jitni Dafa
Movie - PARMANU: The Story Of Pokhran
Singers - Yasser Desai & Jeet Gannguli
Music - Jeet Gannguli
Lyrics - Rashmi Virag
Programming & Mix - Aditya Dev

Directed by Abhishek Sharma. 

Produced by Zee Studios and Kyta Productions in association with JA Entertainment, the film is written by Saiwyn Quadras, Sanyuktha Chawla Shaikh, and Abhishek Sharma. All India Distribution by Vashu Bhagnani's Pooja Entertainment. Parmanu is slated to release on 25 May 2018.

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

Sunderkand, Sunderkand chaupai, sunderkand path, sunderkand full, sunderkand in hindi, सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sampurn SunderKand, sunder kand, sunderkand ka path, sangeetmay sunderkand, sunderkand ramayan, Sunderkand fast, Sunderkand with lyrics, Sunder kand By Prem Parkash Dubey, Sunderkand live, Mangalwar Special, Kam samay main sunderkand, 45 min mein sunderkand, sunderkand in hindi, हनुमान जी का सुंदरकांड, रामायण का सुंदरकांड, संपूर्ण सुंदरकांड चौपाई, सुंदरकांड हिंदी में,सुंदरकांड डाउनलोड, Mangalwar special sunderkand, Tuesday special sunderkand, Tuesday speical, Sunderkand ka path kese karein, अब तक का सबसे कम समय मे गाया गया सम्पूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ, Sunderkand ki chaupaiya, sunderkand sunne ke labh,

snippet.description:
Speed Records presents the official video of Akh Mastani, a Punjabi party song by Ranjit Bawa & music by Desi Crew🔥

Ranjit Bawa is one of the most loved names in Punjabi music, known for his powerful voice and hit Punjabi songs like Jatt Di Akal, Yaari Chandigarh Waliye, and his consistently trending new Punjabi songs that connect with the youth and Punjabi desi audience alike.

Whether you’re into the latest Punjabi songs, searching for a new Ranjit Bawa song, or looking for a trending Punjabi hit, this song is all set to become your next favorite. From its engaging melody to its high-energy vibe, Akh Mastani is made to be played on repeat.
Turn up the volume, feel the vibe, and get ready for Akh Mastani to take over your playlist. 🎶

snippet.description:
గోవింద నామాలు ఒక్కసారి వింటే అదృష్టం మొదలవుతుంది🙏 | Venkateswara Swamy Bhakti Songs In Telugu  


Listen to the powerful Govinda Namalu 🙏 and experience the divine blessings of Lord Venkateswara (Tirumala Balaji). It is believed that even listening once to these sacred Venkateswara Swamy Bhakti Songs can bring good luck, remove negativity, and start a positive change in your life.

Chanting or hearing Govinda Namavali fills your home with spiritual vibrations, peace, and prosperity. Devotees believe that the divine name Govinda Govinda has the power to fulfill wishes, remove obstacles, and attract success and happiness.

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Description:
Bhajan : Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko
Singer : Bhumika Sharma
Language : Hindi
Lyrics : Traditional
Label :mk bhakti junction
Track Genre : Devotional & Sprituals

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

Andy Dhugga & Mankirt Aulakh Presents the beautiful track "Ishq e Pak" on his YouTube channel. Listen to the song and connected with us!

Lyrics :

Tu chadd'de te main lehnde ton
Dohein London padan nu aaye aan
Tu apna-apna lagda ae
Mulk ta channa paraye aa
Main suneya pind taan tera ve
Border de naal lagda ae
Main chehra dakk ke rakhdi aan
Kinni sohni pagg tu bann'da ae

Main bada nimaas tu jaap kare
Dohein dharman layi zaroori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Tainu dekh-dekh din chadd-da ve
Dil tere te hi marda ve
Main deekan teri deed nu hunn
Pora vi na sarda ve
Chann nu takk ke baatan pauni aan
Tera naam lai ke main taan jiyoni aan
Ik nakk banvala thode layi
Je thoddi jee hazoori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Eh farak kyon peya lakeeran da
Main andar-andari tadfaan ni
Teri akkh vi kuj-kuj kehndi ae
Ishq shayad ik tarfa ni
Mainu sakhiyaan puchdiaan khush ae kyon
Lage ishqe da rang chhaya ae
Main aaj-kal sun-na uddariyan ve
Jo geet Sartaaj ne gaya ae

Tainu vekh ke dil vich thand paindi
Feeling kinni goorhi ae
Assi ishq de hi raahi aan
Ikko sadda hai Rabb ve
Saddi jodi vi mash-hoor hou
Jive Buta Singh te Zainab ve
Tere layi rangiyan saariyan ve chunniyan
Teri pagg de naal sab match hundiyan
Grewala tere darshan ve
Akhaan layi bohot zaroori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Main andar-andari tadfaan ni

Ishq shayad ik tarfa ni

Lage ishqe da rang chhaya ae
Main aaj-kal sun-na uddariyan ve
Jo geet Sartaaj ne gaya ae

Tainu vekh ke dil vich thand paindi
Feeling kinni goorhi ae
Assi ishq de hi raahi aan
Ikko sadda hai Rabb ve
Saddi jodi vi mash-hoor hou
Jive Buta Singh te Zainab ve
Tere layi rangiyan saariyan ve chunniyan
Teri pagg de naal sab match hundiyan
Grewala tere darshan ve
Akhaan layi bohot zaroori ae

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा |Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko|Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan#radha
snippet.description:
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna #radhabhajan #bhajanlyrics #krishnabhajan 
 मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा |Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko|Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan#radha 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Music & Composer: Suresh Jangid 
Singer : Suresh
Additional Lyrics : Suresh
Lyrics : Treditional
Editing:   R.R 
Recording Studio : Pander  Recording Studio
Music Label : Palak Bhakti Music



Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Palak  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Palak  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

snippet.title: Akshara Singh : 💋Chumma Lela Raja Ji (Official Video) | Sanam Johar | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
पावरफुल आवाज अउर दिल छू लेवे वाला अंदाज में आ गइल बा सुपरहिट भोजपुरी सॉन्ग “Chumma Lela Raja Ji” 💥🔥
भोजपुरी Queen, Akshara Singh के जादुई आवाज में सजल ई गाना रोमांस, नखरा आ देसी swag के जबरदस्त मिक्स ह 💃❤️
Sanam Johar संग शानदार केमिस्ट्री आ एक्सप्रेशन गाना के औरो मजेदार बना देत बा 😍
गीत के दिल छू लेवे वाला बोल लिखले बा Yadav Raj आ म्यूजिक में जान डालले बा Vinay Vinayak 🎧🎵
त तैयार हो जाईं, काहे कि “Chumma Lela Raja Ji” दिल आ दिमाग दुनो में छा जाए वाला बा! 🚀💥

ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಬಂಧ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಹೂದೋಟದಿಂದ ಹೂವಂತೆ ಬಂದ
ಬದುಕಿನ ಸಿಹಿ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಮುದ್ದಾಡುವಾಸೆ ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಕೂಸೇ
ಹೆಗಲಲ್ಲಿ ಹೊತ್ತು ಸುತ್ತಾಡುವಾಸೆ,

ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಬಂಧ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಹೂದೋಟದಿಂದ ಹೂವಂತೆ ಬಂದ
ಬದುಕಿನ ಸಿಹಿ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ

ಆಡುತ ನಲಿದಾಡುತ ನೀ ಇರು ಇರು ಜೊತೆ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ,
ದೊರಕಂತಿದೆ ಆಕಾಶವೇ ಈ ಮಡಿಲಲಿ ಮಗುವಿನ ಹಾಗೆ,
ಬಯಸದೆಯೇ ಬಂದ ಭಾಗ್ಯ ನೀ,
ಬದುಕಿನಲೇ ಚಂದ ಗದ್ಯ ನೀ,
ನನ್ನ ತೋಳ ರಾಯಭಾರಿ ನೀನೆನೆ,
ನಿನ್ನ ಬಾಳ ಉಸ್ತುವಾರಿ ನಂದೇನೆ,
ನನ್ನೆಲ್ಲಾ ನೋವನು ನೀಗಿಸೋ ಹೂ ಮನಸೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಮಗಳೇ
ನೀ ನನ್ನ ಬಾಳಿಗೆ ಅದೃಷ್ಟ ಮಗಳೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ ಮುತ್ತಂತ ಮಗಳೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ
ನಕ್ಕರೂ ಚೆಂದ, ಅತ್ತರೂ ಚೆಂದ,
ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಬಂಧ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಹೂದೋಟದಿಂದ ಹೂವಂತೆ ಬಂದ
ಬದುಕಿನ ಸಿಹಿ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ

Song : Muddu Magale 
Composer, Arranger and Producer : Nakul Abhyankar

Lyrics : 
ನಕ್ಕರೂ ಚೆಂದ, ಅತ್ತರೂ ಚೆಂದ,
ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಬಂಧ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಹೂದೋಟದಿಂದ ಹೂವಂತೆ ಬಂದ
ಬದುಕಿನ ಸಿಹಿ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಮುದ್ದಾಡುವಾಸೆ ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಕೂಸೇ
ಹೆಗಲಲ್ಲಿ ಹೊತ್ತು ಸುತ್ತಾಡುವಾಸೆ,
ನನ್ನೆಲ್ಲಾ ನೋವನು ನೀಗಿಸೋ ಹೂ ಮನಸೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಮಗಳೇ
ನೀ ನನ್ನ ಬಾಳಿಗೆ ಅದೃಷ್ಟ ಮಗಳೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ ಮುತ್ತಂತ ಮಗಳೇ
ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಮಗಳೇ
ನಕ್ಕರೂ ಚೆಂದ, ಅತ್ತರೂ ಚೆಂದ,
ಮುದ್ದಾದ ಬಂಧ, ಈ ನನ್ನ ಕಂದ
ಹೂದೋಟದಿಂದ ಹೂವಂತೆ ಬಂದ

ಆಡುತ ನಲಿದಾಡುತ ನೀ ಇರು ಇರು ಜೊತೆ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ,
ದೊರಕಂತಿದೆ ಆಕಾಶವೇ ಈ ಮಡಿಲಲಿ ಮಗುವಿನ ಹಾಗೆ,
ಬಯಸದೆಯೇ ಬಂದ ಭಾಗ್ಯ ನೀ,
ಬದುಕಿನಲೇ ಚಂದ ಗದ್ಯ ನೀ,
ನನ್ನ ತೋಳ ರಾಯಭಾರಿ ನೀನೆನೆ,
ನಿನ್ನ ಬಾಳ ಉಸ್ತುವಾರಿ ನಂದೇನೆ,

snippet.title: All Confirmed BGMI Roster Changes! Transfer Window 2026 Update
snippet.description:
➡️ Join TalkEsport Instagram Broadcast: https://insta.openinapp.co/fbu63 🔗
➡️ BGMI Player Transfer Window Tracker: https://openinapp.link/9eky8 🔗
➡️ BGMI Transfer Window Rules Explained: https://openinapp.link/7mzrc 🔗

BGMI transfer window is open from April 1 to 26 and it's been three days. Already a mess. We go through every confirmed move, kill one big rumour, and give a hint about where Jonathan might end up.

Confirmed stuff. XSpark released Punk after one official event. 7th place finish. There's talk the org wants their old IGL back from the 2024 title runs. Madkings dropped Syrax and Pro but kept ClutchGOD and Shadow. Sinewy released everyone — Ninju, Rexboy, Sigma, Moksh, all out. Full reset. Meta Ninza let go of WhiteTiger which is wild because his BGIS form was genuinely good. Zutsu dropped Shiraj, Veyron and Nodi. Higg Bason released Omega and SnowJOD. Simp left Phoenix. Proton left Welt.

On the rumour side. Jelly might be done with True Rippers. Saumraj could show up somewhere unexpected. Beast is being connected to Gods Reign.

That Jonathan joining K9 with Omega, Slug and NinjaBoi thing? Not real. We're putting that to rest right here. What we can say though is there's noise about Jonathan linking back up with a former IGL. Think about who that could be. Nothing confirmed but worth watching.

Right now only Soul and Orangutan seem untouched. Basically everyone else is either rebuilding or thinking about it.

0:00 Transfer Window Open
0:24 Biggest Moves
1:14 XSpark Releases Punk
1:55 Sinv Full Reset
2:09 More Drops
2:41 Rumors
2:56 Jonathan x K9 BUSTED
3:14 Jonathan's Future
3:50 Synergy Over Names
4:12 Outro

en.title: All Confirmed BGMI Roster Changes! Transfer Window 2026 Update
en.description:
➡️ Join TalkEsport Instagram Broadcast: https://insta.openinapp.co/fbu63 🔗
➡️ BGMI Player Transfer Window Tracker: https://openinapp.link/9eky8 🔗
➡️ BGMI Transfer Window Rules Explained: https://openinapp.link/7mzrc 🔗

BGMI transfer window is open from April 1 to 26 and it's been three days. Already a mess. We go through every confirmed move, kill one big rumour, and give a hint about where Jonathan might end up.

Confirmed stuff. XSpark released Punk after one official event. 7th place finish. There's talk the org wants their old IGL back from the 2024 title runs. Madkings dropped Syrax and Pro but kept ClutchGOD and Shadow. Sinewy released everyone — Ninju, Rexboy, Sigma, Moksh, all out. Full reset. Meta Ninza let go of WhiteTiger which is wild because his BGIS form was genuinely good. Zutsu dropped Shiraj, Veyron and Nodi. Higg Bason released Omega and SnowJOD. Simp left Phoenix. Proton left Welt.

On the rumour side. Jelly might be done with True Rippers. Saumraj could show up somewhere unexpected. Beast is being connected to Gods Reign.

That Jonathan joining K9 with Omega, Slug and NinjaBoi thing? Not real. We're putting that to rest right here. What we can say though is there's noise about Jonathan linking back up with a former IGL. Think about who that could be. Nothing confirmed but worth watching.

Right now only Soul and Orangutan seem untouched. Basically everyone else is either rebuilding or thinking about it.

snippet.title: సూర్యభగవానుడి పాటలు | సూర్యాష్టకం | Sunday Special Surya Bhagavan Songs | Suryanarayana Patalu
snippet.description:
సూర్యభగవానుడి పాటలు | సూర్యాష్టకం | Sunday Special Surya Bhagavan Songs | Suryanarayana Patalu

Listen to the divine Surya Bhagavan Songs Sunday Special, a powerful collection of devotional songs dedicated to Lord Surya (Suryanarayana).

This jukebox includes popular and highly searched Surya devotional songs like:

Suryashtakam
Aditya Hrudayam
Surya Sahasranamam
Surya Stotram
Surya Mantra

These powerful chants bring energy, health, success, and positivity into your life.

🙏 Listen every Sunday morning for Surya Bhagavan blessings and positive energy.

✨ Keywords:
Surya Songs, Suryashtakam, Aditya Hrudayam, Sunday Devotional Songs, Surya Mantra, Suryanarayana Songs
